blocks.en: Modern APs have several antennas, and that buys more than range. By sending slightly different copies of a signal from each antenna, the AP can shape beams in space — focusing energy toward a device rather than spraying it everywhere.
blocks.zh: 现代 AP 有多根天线，这带来的不只是覆盖。通过从每根天线发出略有差异的信号副本，AP 能在空间中塑形波束——把能量聚焦到某台设备，而非四处散射。

blocks.en: Several independent streams sent at once over the same channel are called spatial streams (MIMO). When those streams are aimed at DIFFERENT devices simultaneously, it's Multi-User MIMO (MU-MIMO).
blocks.zh: 在同一信道上同时发送的若干条独立数据流称为空间流（MIMO）。当这些流被同时瞄向“不同”的设备时，就是多用户 MIMO（MU-MIMO）。

blocks.en:
graph LR
  AP((AP · 4 antennas))
  AP -- beam 1 --> D1[Laptop]
  AP -- beam 2 --> D2[Phone]
  AP -- beam 3 --> D3[TV]
blocks.zh:
graph LR
  AP((AP · 4 天线))
  AP -- 波束 1 --> D1[笔记本]
  AP -- 波束 2 --> D2[手机]
  AP -- 波束 3 --> D3[电视]

blocks.en: OFDMA splits the channel in frequency; MU-MIMO splits it in space. They compose: an AP can serve some users on different RUs AND others on different spatial beams in the same transmission.
blocks.zh: OFDMA 在频率上切分信道；MU-MIMO 在空间上切分。二者可叠加：AP 能在同一次发送中，既用不同 RU 服务一些用户，又用不同空间波束服务另一些用户。

blocks.en: To aim beams, the AP first needs to know the channel to each device. It asks for ‘sounding’ feedback, the device measures and reports, and the AP uses that to compute its beamforming weights.
blocks.zh: 为了瞄准波束，AP 首先需要知道到每台设备的信道。它请求“探测”反馈，设备测量并上报，AP 据此计算其波束成形权重。

blocks.en: The MU-MIMO beamforming training procedures and their MLME primitives are specified around clause 6.5.22.3, with the sounding/feedback machinery referenced from the beamforming clauses.
blocks.zh: MU-MIMO 波束成形训练过程及其 MLME 原语规定于 6.5.22.3 节附近，探测/反馈机制由波束成形相关章节引用。
